subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! I have heard thy cry and thy lamentation in thy love for God, the Lord of all worlds. Thy letter hath come and been read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد سمعت ضجیجک و صریخک فی حب الله رب العالمین قد حضر کتابک و قرئه
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God
